name: Athos Georgiou
bio: Athos Georgiou is an applied AI researcher and the Founder & CEO of NCA, specializing in vision-language retrieval, LLM inference optimization, and multimodal document understanding. He created Snappy (83 stars), a vision-language retrieval system that unifies ColPali late-interaction with structured OCR via patch-to-region relevance propagation — the subject of both an arXiv paper and an open-source release. His benchmark study on architecture-aware LLM inference for AMD Instinct MI325X GPUs spans models from 235B to 1 trillion parameters. Georgiou trains and publishes his own ColQwen retrieval models on Hugging Face, and actively contributes to the Claude Code ecosystem with plugins like kimchi-cult and agent-debate.

timeline.event: Published blog post 'Diminishing Returns and the Art of Knowing When to Stop' on ColQwen3.5 optimization plateaus
Published ColQwen3.5-4.5B v1/v2/v3 visual document retrieval models on Hugging Face
Published arXiv paper 'Architecture-Aware LLM Inference Optimization on AMD Instinct GPUs'
Participated in the launch event for the Greek AI Startup Accelerator by OpenAI, the Hellenic Government, and Endeavor Greece
Published blog post 'Closing the AI Value Gap: Insights from Research' on enterprise AI adoption
Published arXiv paper 'Spatially-Grounded Document Retrieval via Patch-to-Region Relevance Propagation'
Released Snappy, a vision-language retrieval system unifying ColPali with structured OCR (83 stars)
Published 'The Most Beautiful RAG' — end-to-end vision RAG with ColPali, Qdrant, and MinIO
Co-authored 'Raising Artificial Intelligence' on responsible AI frameworks with Olga Topchaya
Incorporated NCA LTD as a private limited company in the UK

key_contributions.title: Snappy
key_contributions.description: Vision-language retrieval system unifying ColPali late-interaction with structured OCR via patch-to-region relevance propagation. 83 stars on GitHub.

key_contributions.title: Architecture-Aware LLM Inference Optimization on AMD Instinct GPUs
key_contributions.description: Comprehensive benchmark spanning 235B to 1T parameter models, co-optimizing model architecture, hardware, and serving-system configuration on MI325X GPUs

key_contributions.title: ColQwen3.5-4.5B (v1–v3)
key_contributions.description: Series of visual document retrieval models trained and published on Hugging Face, iterating on ColQwen architecture for multimodal retrieval

key_contributions.title: Qdrant-Neo4j-Ollama Graph RAG
key_contributions.description: Graph RAG implementation combining Qdrant vector search with Neo4j knowledge graphs and Ollama for local LLM inference. 58 stars.

key_contributions.title: Titanium
key_contributions.description: Full-stack AI application framework. 47 stars on GitHub.

key_contributions.title: kimchi-cult
key_contributions.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for discovering and sharing AI development tools

key_contributions.title: Raising Artificial Intelligence
key_contributions.description: Co-authored framework for responsible AI development, addressing ethics, regulation, and governance through a parent-child relationship metaphor

key_contributions.title: CopperAI
key_contributions.description: Hands-free voice-to-voice interaction system with LLMs. 29 stars.

quotes.text: AI development much like parenting, comes with rights and responsibilities. Creators, users, and regulators have distinct rights and responsibilities.

It's a powerful statistical model capable of generating text, but it lacks intelligence, creativity, and consciousness. Achieving AGI will likely require a combination of several models and technologies, not just GenAI.
Helping organisations navigate AI adoption through applied research, performance engineering, and production-grade implementation.
